channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Siri AI Refuses URL Summaries in iOS 27 Beta 2
item.description: Siri AI in iOS 27 beta 2 will now clearly refuse requests to summarize URLs, changing its interaction protocol. This aims to enhance user experience and content integrity.

item.title: Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 Cast Revealed
item.description: The voice cast for Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 has been announced, featuring new actors for iconic characters like Fox and Falco. Fans can expect fresh performances in this beloved franchise.

item.title: Google Play Store Opens to Alternative Payments
item.description: Google will introduce alternative billing options in the Play Store, reducing commissions for in-app purchases. This move aims to enhance developer revenue and competition.

item.title: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 Design Leaks
item.description: New leaks reveal the design of the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, showcasing a familiar look. The smartwatch continues Samsung's trend of iterative design updates.

item.title: GTA 6 Priced at $80, No Physical Disc
item.description: GTA 6 will retail for $80, with physical editions providing a digital download code instead of a disc. This reflects changing trends in game distribution.

item.title: Valve Acknowledges High Costs of Steam Machine
item.description: Valve admits the Steam Machine's price is higher than expected, with uncertainty about future price reductions. This reflects ongoing challenges in the gaming hardware market.
